European Union officials approved new trade sanctions against Russian energy exports following military aggression in Ukraine.
Agricultural subsidies in developing nations are being reviewed under new international trade agreements.
Anti-dumping investigations launched against Chinese steel imports prompted retaliatory tariffs from several major trading partners.
